nml_option.name: config_AM_aceSeaiceDerivedFields_enable
nml_option.description: If true, sea ice analysis member aceSeaiceDerivedFields is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_aceSeaiceDerivedFields_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_aceSeaiceDerivedFields_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the aceSeaiceDerivedFields analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_aceSeaiceDerivedFields_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_aceSeaiceDerivedFields_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_aceSeaiceDerivedFields_horiz_remap_file
nml_option.description: Path to the horizontal remapping file for ACE training data.
nml_option.possible_values: Path to a remap file or 'none'

package.name: aceSeaiceDerivedFieldsAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the aceSeaiceDerivedFields analysis member.

var.name: iceAreaTotal
var.description: Total ice area fraction summed over categories

var.name: iceVolumeTotal
var.description: Total ice volume per unit grid cell area summed over categories

var.name: snowVolumeTotal
var.description: Total snow volume per unit grid cell area summed over categories
